content.problemStatement: Given a string **s1**, a character **c1**, and an integer **k**, find and print the position of the kkkth occurrence of the character **c1** in the string **s1**. If the kkkth occurrence does not exist, print **-1**.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains the string **s1**, the character **c1**, and the integer **k** separated by spaces.
content.outputFormat:
An integer representing the position of the kkkth occurrence of **c1** in **s1**.
If the kkkth occurrence does not exist, print **-1**.
